narrative:
Precinct Goshen #3/Barnhill (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 795 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
